| **Investor Type** | Portfolio Landlord (5+ properties) |

| **Properties Owned** | 12 investment properties (Wake County) |
| **Estimated Portfolio Value** | $3.2M |
| **Entity Type** | LLC (registered 2020) |
| **Mailing Address** | Out-of-state (New York, NY) |
| **Key Signals** | Absentee out-of-state, LLC-owned, portfolio 5+, no homestead, multi-family holdings |

**Portfolio Snapshot:**
- 8 single-family rentals ($180K-$340K each)
- 2 duplexes ($420K-$510K each)
- 2 condos ($165K-$195K each)
- Most recent acquisition: Oct 2025 ($285,000)
- Acquisition pace: ~3 properties/year since 2020

**Financing Intelligence:**
- Estimated total equity: $1.1M+ (34% equity ratio)
- Cash-out potential (75% LTV): ~$280K available
- Refi signals: Rate reduction candidate (2022 vintage loans), equity harvest eligible
- Estimated portfolio DSCR: 1.35

**Why This Lead Matters:**
Active acquirer with 12 properties, $1.1M+ in equity, and a clear pattern of scaling. Out-of-state LLC structure suggests sophisticated investor comfortable with DSCR products. Cash-out refi potential opens immediate conversation.

## HOW WE BUILD THESE DOSSIERS

```
Public Property Records (all 100 NC counties)
    ↓
ICP Scoring Engine (11 investor segments, 15+ signals)
    ↓
Entity Resolution (LLC/Trust/Corp → real person)
    ↓
Contact Enrichment (skip trace, email, phone verification)
    ↓
Financing Intelligence (mortgage records, equity calc, refi signals)
    ↓
Wealth & Behavioral Signals (FEC, IRS 990, acquisition patterns)
    ↓
RANKED, CONTACT-READY DOSSIER
```

**684,895** NC investment properties analyzed
**65,942** Tier 1 leads identified (Wake + Mecklenburg)
**Expanding** to all 100 NC counties
